description.en: Create a secure cloud wallet for a supported blockchain like MultiversX or Solana. Your agent can use the wallet to send and receive tokens, interact with smart contracts, and manage on-chain assets on your behalf.
description.de: Erstelle ein sicheres Cloud-Wallet für eine unterstützte Blockchain wie MultiversX oder Solana. Dein Agent kann damit Token senden und empfangen, mit Smart Contracts interagieren und On-Chain-Assets für dich verwalten.
description.es: Create a secure cloud wallet for a supported blockchain like MultiversX or Solana. Your agent can use the wallet to send and receive tokens, interact with smart contracts, and manage on-chain assets on your behalf.
description.fr: Create a secure cloud wallet for a supported blockchain like MultiversX or Solana. Your agent can use the wallet to send and receive tokens, interact with smart contracts, and manage on-chain assets on your behalf.
description.ro: Create a secure cloud wallet for a supported blockchain like MultiversX or Solana. Your agent can use the wallet to send and receive tokens, interact with smart contracts, and manage on-chain assets on your behalf.
description.it: Create a secure cloud wallet for a supported blockchain like MultiversX or Solana. Your agent can use the wallet to send and receive tokens, interact with smart contracts, and manage on-chain assets on your behalf.

description.en: The blockchain to create the wallet for (e.g. multiversx, solana)
description.de: Die Blockchain, für die das Wallet erstellt werden soll (z.B. multiversx, solana)
description.es: The blockchain to create the wallet for (e.g. multiversx, solana)
description.fr: The blockchain to create the wallet for (e.g. multiversx, solana)
description.ro: The blockchain to create the wallet for (e.g. multiversx, solana)
description.it: The blockchain to create the wallet for (e.g. multiversx, solana)

success.en: Your {{chain}} wallet has been created! You can manage it in your agent settings.
success.de: Dein {{chain}}-Wallet wurde erstellt! Du kannst es in deinen Agent-Einstellungen verwalten.
success.es: Your {{chain}} wallet has been created! You can manage it in your agent settings.
success.fr: Your {{chain}} wallet has been created! You can manage it in your agent settings.
success.ro: Your {{chain}} wallet has been created! You can manage it in your agent settings.
success.it: Your {{chain}} wallet has been created! You can manage it in your agent settings.

already_exists.en: Your agent already has a {{chain}} wallet.
already_exists.es: Your agent already has a {{chain}} wallet.
already_exists.fr: Your agent already has a {{chain}} wallet.
already_exists.ro: Your agent already has a {{chain}} wallet.
already_exists.it: Your agent already has a {{chain}} wallet.

provider_error.en: The wallet provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
provider_error.de: Der Wallet-Anbieter ist vorübergehend nicht verfügbar. Bitte versuche es später erneut.
provider_error.es: The wallet provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
provider_error.fr: The wallet provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
provider_error.ro: The wallet provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
provider_error.it: The wallet provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

error.en: Something went wrong while creating your wallet. Please try again.
error.de: Beim Erstellen deines Wallets ist etwas schiefgelaufen. Bitte versuche es erneut.
error.es: Something went wrong while creating your wallet. Please try again.
error.fr: Something went wrong while creating your wallet. Please try again.
error.ro: Something went wrong while creating your wallet. Please try again.
error.it: Something went wrong while creating your wallet. Please try again.
